name: Sauge de Fleur
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>時</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>とき</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>花</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ばな</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>賢</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>けん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>者</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゃ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－フルール・ド・サージュ
name_jp_rom: Tokibana no Kenja - Furūru Do Sāju
name_jp_tl: Sage of the Time Flower - Fleur de Sage
desc: You can target 1 monster you control and 1 card on the field; Special Summon this card from your hand, and if you do, destroy them. If this card is sent from the field to your GY: You can target 1 other monster in your GY; shuffle it into the Deck, then add 1 Level 1 Plant monster from your Deck or GY to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Sauge de Fleur" once per turn.
mnst_eff: You can target 1 monster you control and 1 card on the field; Special Summon this card from your hand, and if you do, destroy them. If this card is sent from the field to your GY: You can target 1 other monster in your GY; shuffle it into the Deck, then add 1 Level 1 Plant monster from your Deck or GY to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Sauge de Fleur" once per turn.

action: Returns from your Graveyard to your Deck
